label: Subagent • computer_use through host (scripted multi-toggle)
query: In System Settings, turn on Night Shift and Bluetooth.
notes: Model-free. Drives the REAL computer_use host (SubagentSession + ComputerUseKind) against an in-memory ScriptedCUDriver via scripted agent_action JSON, so the whole host wrapper (recursion guard, live feed, done→success envelope, compact result) runs in CI with no tokens. Extends cu-scripted-toggle to TWO toggles and asserts BOTH host parity (success envelope, computer_use result kind, CU feed kinds) AND world state (both switches on, Wi-Fi never touched).
